environment.title: Environment
environment.subtitle: Compute resources in this organization, the agents bound to them, in-flight work items, and file transfers.

workers.title: Workers
workers.emptyHint: A worker is a machine where agents actually run. Add at least one to start dispatching tasks.

worker.noAgents: No agents bound to this worker.
worker.executableNote: Executable: claude-code only (codex/opencode discovery only — v2.8)
worker.remintConfirmMessage: Re-mint will revoke the current install token and issue a fresh one. Use this if the original command expired or got lost. Continue?
worker.removeConfirmMessageOnline:
Remove worker "{{name}}"?

This will revoke the worker token and remove the record. The worker daemon will hit 401 next cycle.
worker.removeConfirmMessageOffline:
Remove worker "{{name}}"?

This will revoke any active install token and remove the record.

activity.title: Activity
activity.emptyHint: Work items, issues, and file transfers will appear here.

humans.title: Humans
humans.emptyBody: Invite self-registered users to join this organization.
humans.note: Disable = keeps member identity & history but marks inactive. Drop = permanently removes the human from this organization (no record kept).
humans.dropConfirmMessage: Drop {{name}} from this organization? This permanently removes their membership — no record is kept. This cannot be undone.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.emptyBody: Invite existing users by their user identity id.
invitations.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete the invitation for {{name}}? This removes the invitation record and its link will no longer work.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.enableBody: This organization is currently disabled — non-owner members cannot sign in to it. Enable it to restore access for everyone.
danger.disableBody: Non-owner members can no longer sign in to this organization; you (as owner) keep full access and can re-enable it any time. No data is deleted.
danger.forceDeleteBody: Delete this organization from the workspace and disable all joined members. This action cannot be undone from the UI.
danger.auditLogBody: View all organization changes, member actions, and system events.
danger.enableConfirmMessage: Enable organization {{name}}? All members will be able to sign in again.
danger.disableConfirmMessage: Disable organization {{name}}? Non-owner members will be locked out until you re-enable it. You keep full access. No data is deleted.
danger.forceDeleteConfirmMessage: Force-delete organization {{name}}? This removes it from the organization switcher and disables its joined members. This cannot be undone from the UI.

modal.title: Organization Settings
modal.deleteConfirmSuffix: ? This cannot be undone, and you must be an owner.
modal.slugTooShort: Slug must be at least 3 characters
modal.slugTooLong: Slug must be at most 40 characters
modal.slugHyphenEdge: Slug cannot start or end with a hyphen

repos.title: Repositories
repos.subtitle: Workspace-level code repos. Projects reference them; credentials are configured here only.

empty.title: No repositories yet
empty.body: Add a workspace repository so projects can reference it. Click + Add repo to create one.

delete.title: Delete repository?
delete.message: Delete "{{label}}"? This will permanently remove its stored credential. This cannot be undone.
delete.messageRefs_one: Delete "{{label}}"? This will drop its reference from {{count}} project and permanently remove its stored credential. This cannot be undone.
delete.messageRefs_other: Delete "{{label}}"? This will drop its reference from {{count}} projects and permanently remove its stored credential. This cannot be undone.

remote.heading: Remote —
remote.footer: Live from the remote (go-github; falls back to git ls-remote). Never cloned.
remote.unavailable: Remote viewing isn't available right now.

commit.browseTitle: Browse the repository at this point

form.label: Label
form.descriptionHint: One line so an agent understands the repo without checking it out.
form.credentialHintEdit: Leave blank to keep the stored credential.
form.credentialHelp: Private repos need a read-only credential. For GitHub, create a <tokenLink>fine-grained token</tokenLink> scoped to this repository with <contents>Contents: Read-only</contents> (add <prs>Pull requests: Read</prs> to view PRs). A GitHub App installation token or a read-only deploy key works too. Public repos can leave this blank.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Workflow templates define orchestration rules for plans. Agents read these to scaffold graphs.
templates.name: Name
templates.contentPlaceholder: Markdown content describing the orchestration rules...
templates.deleteConfirm: Delete template "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
templates.emptyDesc: Create a workflow template or wait for system templates to be seeded.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.disclaimer: Values are stored encrypted and never displayed after creation. To rotate a secret, revoke and create a new one.

empty.title: No secrets yet
empty.body: Secrets store API keys + tokens that agents reference at runtime. Values are encrypted at rest and never displayed after creation.

confirm.title: Revoke secret?
confirm.message: Revoke secret "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

modal.title: New secret
modal.name: Name
modal.valueHelp: Stored encrypted. Never displayed again — to rotate, revoke this secret and create a new one.

wakeGuardrail.title: Wake guardrails
wakeGuardrail.description: Prevent runaway agent-to-agent wakes (chain depth / cycles / rate limit / token budget). Applied immediately on save — no restart needed.

max_depth.label: Max wake-chain depth
max_depth.hint: Max hops in one wake chain; exceeding it trips the breaker · default {{def}}

cycle_window_sec.label: Cycle-detection window (seconds)
cycle_window_sec.hint: Round-trips are counted within this rolling window · default {{def}}

cycle_threshold.label: Cycle threshold (round-trips per window)
cycle_threshold.hint: Reaching this many round-trips in the window trips the breaker · default {{def}}

rate_per_min.label: Rate limit (agent wakes per minute)
rate_per_min.hint: Tokens for agent-driven wakes of a single agent per minute · default {{def}}

chain_token_budget.label: Chain token budget (root)
chain_token_budget.hint: Cost budget per wake chain, decremented each hop · default {{def}}

wakeGuardrail.invalid: All thresholds must be positive integers (> 0).
